content_fingerprint: openai ships codex rust alpha 0 126 0 alpha 7 openai has tagged a new pre release of its rust based codex implementation marking continued incremental progress on the coding agent s underlying engine openai published a new alpha release tagged rust v0 126 0 alpha 7 on the public codex repository on april 27 2026 the release appears in the project s github atom feed with a timestamp of 14 09 15 utc the repository hosts the codebase for openai codex the company s autonomous coding agent designed to plan write and modify software across a broad range of development tasks the rust prefixed version
